title: avena elatior subsp. bulbosa
intro: Avena elatior subsp. bulbosa, also known as the wild oat or oat grass, is a subspecies of wild oat that is native to Europe and Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to calm the nervous system and promote relaxation, making it a popular herbal remedy for insomnia, anxiety, and restlessness. The health benefits of Avena elatior subsp. bulbosa include reducing stress and anxiety, promoting better sleep, and improving mood, as well as supporting digestion and reducing inflammation. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed before bed to promote a restful night's sleep and wake up feeling refreshed and revitalized.
